mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT_REPORT WHERE REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE TRUNC(ORDER_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CR.REPORT_ID AS reportId, CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO AS reporterMemberNo, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID AS reportTypeId, CR.REPORT_REASON AS reportReason, CR.REPORT_DATE AS reportDate, CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN AS reportProcessYn FROM COMMENT_REPORT CR LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO ORDER BY CR.REPORT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.ORDER_ID AS orderId, O.ORDERER_NAME AS ordererName, O.ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE AS orderTotalPrice, O.ORDER_DATE AS orderDate, O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN AS orderCancelYn FROM ORDERS O ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
